name: stage-wakelock-reacquire
description: P1-1 (P0): the Wake Lock API auto-releases on ANY backgrounding (notification, call, app-switch) via the browser's own visibilitychange handling. Stage must re-acquire the lock when the tab becomes visible again while still performing - otherwise the screen can sleep mid-song with no warning.

steps.label: spy installed on navigator.wakeLock.request BEFORE Stage opens, so the entry call is counted too
Stage entry requested the wake lock once
simulate backgrounding then returning to the foreground (visibilitychange hidden -> visible)
RED GOALPOST (P1-1): wake lock re-acquired a SECOND time after the tab becomes visible again while Stage is still open
